# A file containing only workstation definitions — no SCHEDULE blocks.
# Must parse cleanly: status=ok, parsed_schedules=0, workstations=2.

CPUNAME WS_PRIMARY
  DESCRIPTION "Primary workstation"
  OS UNIX
  NODE primary.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
    AUTOLINK ON
    BEHINDFIREWALL OFF
END

CPUNAME WS_SECONDARY
  DESCRIPTION "Secondary workstation"
  OS UNIX
  NODE secondary.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
END
